link.name: Pathfinder #208: Hoof, Cinder, and Storm pg. 79
link.alt: Pathfinder #208: Hoof, Cinder, and Storm pg. 79

stat_block.text: With careful alchemical treatments, orc weaponsmiths can enhance the durability and flexibility of giant scorpion tails to create multi-headed *+1 striking flails*. Additional enchantments allow the stingers to generate their own venom. When you would apply this flail’s critical specialization, you can instead deal 1d6 persistent poison damage to the target. You gain an item bonus to the persistent poison damage equal to the weapon’s item bonus to attack rolls.

traits.name: Uncommon
traits.text: Something of uncommon rarity requires special training or comes from a particular culture or part of the world. Some character choices give access to uncommon options, and the GM can choose to allow access for anyone. Less is known about uncommon creatures than common creatures. They typically can't be summoned. The DC of Recall Knowledge checks related to these creature is increased by 2.

traits.name: Magical
traits.text: Something with the magical trait is imbued with magical energies not tied to a specific tradition of magic. Some items or effects are closely tied to a particular tradition of magic. In these cases, the item has the arcane, divine, occult, or primal trait instead of the magical trait. Any of these traits indicate that the item is magical.

traits.name: Poison
traits.text: An effect with this trait delivers a poison or deals poison damage. An item with this trait is poisonous and might cause an affliction.

abilities.name: Activate
abilities.effect: You temporarily fill the flail’s stingers with venom. The next successful Strike you make with it before the end of your next turn deals 2d6 persistent poison damage to the target. If the Strike critically succeeds and if you would apply persistent poison damage with this weapon’s alternate critical specialization, you combine the two effects to deal 3d6 persistent poison damage to the target.

traits.name: Manipulate
traits.text: You must physically manipulate an item or make gestures to use an action with this trait. Creatures without a suitable appendage can’t perform actions with this trait. Manipulate actions often trigger reactions.

traits.name: Poison
traits.text: An effect with this trait delivers a poison or deals poison damage. An item with this trait is poisonous and might cause an affliction.
